title: Vaessen Creative Satin Ribbon, White, 3mm x 10m, Elegant Shine for Card Making, Scrapbooks, Gift Wrapping and Other Craft Projects,301002-0003
features: DOUBLE-SIDED SATIN SHEEN – The ribbon has a shiny and smooth surface on both sides for a professional and symmetrical effect. Soft and silky material that can be used to make different shapes

STUNNING COLOURS – With 24 bright colours to choose from you’ll certainly find a fitting match for any project and season! From bold primary colours that are perfect for holiday decorations to sweet pastels for baby showers

PERFECT FOR CRAFT PROJECTS – Ribbons are very adaptable and can be used in just about any craft project. Use them to make ribbon wreaths and baby toys or weave a line of ribbon through a card to add a lovely effect. Scrapbookers can use ribbon to decorate a cover, frame a picture or as a bookmark! Ribbons are great to have on hand in your craft room

HANDY PACKAGING – Durable flat round cardboard spool that you can hang up or stack with other colours for easy storage. Special slots on either side of the spool to place the end of the ribbon after use ensure the ribbon can be wound up nice and tidy
MEASUREMENTS – Each pack contains 1 spool of ribbon, measuring 3 mm wide by 10 metres long. The ribbon is easy to cut with scissors so can be cut to any preferred length
description: High-density ribbon with a double-sided shiny and smooth surface for an elegant satin sheen and silky soft touch. The stitched edges give the ribbon a neat finish. Crafters will enjoy using this lovely ribbon to embellish scrapbook pages, thread through cards, add as stylish cake board edging or use to tie up gifts and sachets. This stunning ribbon is sure to impress. Suitable for beginners and more experienced crafters of all ages. The material is flexible and can be used to make many different shapes. The high-quality ribbon comes on a durable round spool that can be hung up or stacked with other colours for easy storage. To make working with the ribbon as effortless as possible, there are special slots on either side of the spool to place the end of the ribbon after use so that you can keep your material wound up nice and tidy. Vaessen Creative Satin Ribbon is available in 24 bright colours. Choose your favourite shades in the options above. From bold colours that would typically be used for Christmas decorations, Father’s Day cards or Halloween decor to softer pastel tones for Easter celebrations, Wedding invitations and new-born gifts. You’re sure to find a fitting match for your project. Vaessen Creative Satin Ribbon is available in three widths (3mm 6mm or 9mm) and in two lengths (10m and 100m). This pack contains 1 spool of ribbon in size 3 mm x 10 m.
